title: DLP - PII Leakage in Application Logs
description: Automated log scanner detected several patterns matching Social Security Numbers (SSN) and Credit Card Numbers (CC) in the cleartext logs of the 'Checkout-API' service in the production environment. This is a violation of the secure logging policy.

timeline.event: Application release v2.4.1 deployed to Checkout-API service
DLP scanner triggers on cleartext patterns in /var/log/checkout.log
